\tzpentry{ID3830}{Gyromagnetic Wavefunction Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3830 introduces Gyromagnetic Wavefunction Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align*} \psi_{\text{gyro}}(g,\omega) &= \exp\bigl(-|\omega-\omega_0|^2/(2\Delta\omega^2)\bigr) Y_{\ell m}(g),\\ \psi_{\text{magnetic}}(n) &= \frac{(a^\dagger)^n}{\sqrt{n!}}\,|0\rangle,\\ \psi_{\text{photon}}(n_L,n_R) &= \frac{(\hat{a}_L^\dagger)^{n_L}(\hat{a}_R^\dagger)^{n_R} + \mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{i}\varphi_{\text{helix}}}(\hat{a}_R^\dagger)^{n_L}(\hat{a}_L^\dagger)^{n_R}}{\sqrt{n_L! n_R!}}\,|0,0\rangle. \end{align*}
